name: jain-events-portal
description: A web portal for Jain University Events.

scripts.dev: pnpx concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "B,C" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:clientview"
scripts.start: pnpx concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "B,C" "pnpm run start:backend" "pnpm run start:clientview"
scripts.build: pnpx concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "B,C" "pnpm run build:backend" "pnpm run build:clientview"
scripts.init: pnpx concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "B,C" "pnpm run init:backend" "pnpm run init:clientview"
scripts.update: pnpx concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "B,C" "pnpm run update:backend" "pnpm run update:clientview"
scripts.clean:backend: cd backend && pnpm cache delete && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.clean:clientview: cd clientview && pnpm cache delete && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.clean: pnpx concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "B,C" "pnpm run clean:backend" "pnpm run clean:clientview" && pnpm cache delete && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.ssh:deploy: ssh fet@ssh.sa-fet.com "cd ~/all-projects/Jain-Events-Portal && branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) && git fetch origin $branch && git reset --hard origin/$branch && pnpm run init && pnpm build && pm2 reload fet-hub"

author: Jery
